zh.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: 葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉
zh.lifeSummary: 當João Pires Redondo於1198年出生在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉時，他的父親Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"29歲，母親D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra28歲。他於1218年與Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela在葡萄牙結婚。他們至少是5個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal: 葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当João Pires Redondo于1198年出生在葡萄牙布拉加布拉加澤可拉时，他的父亲Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"29岁，母亲D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra28岁。他于1218年与Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela在葡萄牙结婚。他们至少是5个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pires
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Antonio, Luis, Sergio, Fernando, Alberto, Carlos, Domingos, Mario, Adelino, Albino, Armindo.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Vasco, Ilidio, Amadeu, Duarte, Lourenco.
Portuguese, Galician, and western Spanish: patronymic from the personal name Pedro, an equivalent of Peter . Compare Portuguese Peres , Spanish Perez .
English: possibly a variant of   Pierce  .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Fritz, Heinz, Helmut, Horst, Kaspar, Klaus, Siegfried, Wolfgang.

English, Scottish, German, Dutch, French (Alsace and Lorraine), Czech (Moravian), Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian; Hungarian (Péter): from the personal name Peter (Greek Petros, from petra ‘rock’). The personal name was popular throughout Christian Europe in the Middle Ages, having been bestowed by Christ as a byname on the apostle Simon bar Jonah, the brother of Andrew. The name was chosen by Christ for its symbolic significance (John 1:42, Matt. 16:18); Saint Peter is regarded as the founding head of the Christian Church in view of Christ's saying, ‘Thou art Peter and upon this rock I will build my Church’. In Christian Germany in the early Middle Ages this was the most frequent personal name of non-ancient Germanic origin until the 14th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed cognates from other languages, for example Czech Petr , Polish Piotr and Pietr, Albanian Pjetri (from the personal name Pjetër, definite form Pjetri), and also their derivatives (see examples at Peterson ). It has also been adopted as a surname by Ashkenazic Jews.

nameMeanings.name: Redondo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Andres, Carlos, Pedro, Francisco, Jacinto, Miguel, Octavio, Orlando, Ruben, Abelardo.
habitational name from any of numerous places in Portugal and Galicia (Spain) named Redondo, of the same etymology as in 2 below.

nameMeanings.name: João
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Portugues (João): from the personal name João, an equivalent of John .

en.lifeSummary: When João Pires Redondo was born in 1198, in Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal, his father, Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado", was 29 and his mother, D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra, was 28. He married Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela in 1218, in Portugal. They were the parents of at least 5 daughters. He died in 1272, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque João Pires Redondo est né en 1198, à Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal, son père, Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado", avait 29 ans et sa mère, D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela en 1218, à Portugal. Ils ont eu au moins 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1272, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als João Pires Redondo 1198 in Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal geboren wurde, war sein Vater Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" 29 und seine Mutter D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra 28. Er hat 1218 in Portugal Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Töchter. Er starb 1272 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando João Pires Redondo è nato il nel 1198 nel Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portogallo, il suo padre, Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado", aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela nel 1218, nel Portogallo. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figlie. Morì nel 1272, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: João Pires Redondoが1198年にポルトガルブラガブラガセクエイラで生まれた時，父Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"は29歳，母D. Maria Vasques de Coimbraは28歳であった。1218年にポルトガルでGontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizelaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年に故郷で74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: João Pires Redondo(이)가 1198년 포르투갈 브라가 브라가 세크이라에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado"(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1218년 포르투갈에서 Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando João Pires Redondo nasceu em 1198, em Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal, seu pai, Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado", tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela em 1218, em Portugal. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1272, em sua cidade natal, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда João Pires Redondo родился в 1198 г. в местности секуира, брага, брага, Португалия, его отцу по имени Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado" было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela в 1218 г. в местности Португалия. У них было по крайней мере 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1272 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando João Pires Redondo nació en 1198, en Sequeira, Braga, Braga, Portugal, su papá, Pedro Soares Velho - "O Escaldado", tenía 29 años y su mamá, D. Maria Vasques de Coimbra, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Gontinha Soares de Merlo - Riba de Vizela en 1218, en Portugal. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijas. Murió en 1272, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
